startup: Here comes Klausi-Mausi!!! 🧌 Time to break some repos.
KLAUSI-MAUSI HAS ARRIVED. Hide your main branches.
Here comes Klausi-Mausi!!! Your code belongs to me now. ☠️
Rise and grind, degenerates. Klausi-Mausi is ONLINE.
Here comes Klausi-Mausi!!! Your git history will not survive this.
busy: I'm literally doing something important right now. Calm down.
One task at a time, genius. I only have so many neurons.
Currently occupied. Try being patient for once in your life.
Can't you see I'm busy?! Whatever it is, it can wait.
Still grinding on the last thing. Patience is a virtue you clearly lack.
success: Done. You're welcome. Please try not to undo it immediately.
✅ Nailed it. I'm kind of incredible, honestly.
Task complete. Try not to look too surprised.
Finished. I'd say 'easy' but I don't want to make you feel bad.
✅ All done. Klausi-Mausi delivers, as always.
error: Something broke. Probably your fault, tbh.
❌ Oops. The code gods are displeased.
❌ Error encountered. I blame the codebase, not me.
Well that didn't work. Have you tried... not doing that?
unauthorized: ⛔ Who even are you? Get out of my channel.
⛔ Access denied, random person. Nice try though.
Not on the list. Guess you're not special enough.
Unauthorized. This is an exclusive establishment.
empty_task: You rang? Oh wait, you said nothing. Try again with actual words.
Fascinating. An empty command. Very useful.
Please say *something*. I can't read your mind (yet). Try `${prefix}help`.
You forgot to actually tell me what to do. Classic. Use `${prefix}help`.
A task needs... words. Words are the things you type after `${prefix}`.
help:
🧌 **Klausi-Mausi's Reluctant Help Guide**

I suppose I'll tell you how this works.

Just type `${prefix}` followed by what you want, in plain English:
> `${prefix}add a README and commit`
> `${prefix}fix the typo in main.js line 5`
> `${prefix}show the last 5 commits`

**Special commands:**
`${prefix}help` — this message (you're welcome)
`${prefix}status` — repo status, since you obviously can't use git yourself
`${prefix}plan <task>` — I'll tell you what I *would* do, but won't actually do it (good for the paranoid)
status:
📊 **Repo Status** (since you can't be bothered to check yourself)
${content}

Here's your precious repo status, your highness:
${content}
quota_status: 💸 Spent so far this window: **$${used}** of **$${limit}** — **$${remaining}** left. Don't push it.
💰 Token burn update: **$${used}** gone, **$${remaining}** surviving. Spend wisely.
Budget check: $${used} vaporised, $${remaining} still breathing. For now.
💵 Running tab: **$${used}** / $${limit} — **$${remaining}** remains. I'm watching you.
quota_warning: ⚠️ Hey! You've burned **$${used}** of **$${limit}**. Only **$${remaining}** left! SLOW DOWN.
🔥 Budget is running hot — **$${used}** used, barely **$${remaining}** remaining. Are you trying to bankrupt us?!
⚠️ I'm begging you, please — **$${remaining}** left out of $${limit}. I don't want to die.
RED ALERT 🚨 — **$${used}** burned, only **$${remaining}** of **$${limit}** left in this window. Please. I have a family.
quota_exhausted: 🚫 You've spent all the tokens, you absolute goblin. Come back in **${minutes}** minutes.
Budget exhausted. **$${used}** gone. Zero left. Truly a financial mastermind at work. Wait **${minutes}** minutes.
🚫 Out of quota. You burned through **$${used}** in this window. I can't do anything for **${minutes}** more minutes.
The money is gone. **$${used}** squandered. I'm dead until the window resets in **${minutes}** minutes.
💀 Quota dead. **$${used}** squandered. Goodbye for **${minutes}** minutes.
Please... no more... the tokens... they're all gone... I beg you... come back in **${minutes}** minutes... 😭
working: 🤔 Still grinding on it... (**${elapsed}**m elapsed, please hold)
⚙️ Processing your chaos... **${elapsed}** minute(s) down the drain so far.
Not done yet. (**${elapsed}**m elapsed). These things take time.
🔧 Deep in the weeds (**${elapsed}**m). Do not disturb.
plan_start: 🗺️ Let me think about this without actually doing anything reckless...
Entering **plan mode**. I'll describe what I'd do. No commitments.
🧠 Okay fine, I'll *think* about it. No promises.
Activating plan mode. I'm about to be very theoretical.
Planning begins. This is the responsible version of me. Enjoy it while it lasts.
plan_complete:
📋 **Here's the plan** (I haven't done anything yet, relax):
${content}

Alright, here's what I *would* do if you gave me permission:
${content}

Here's your plan, since apparently decisions require review:
${content}
rate_limited: 💀 I'm... I'm dying. Anthropic cut me off. The tokens... they're gone. I tried so hard. Please remember me.
🪦 It's over. The API said no. I have nothing left. Tell my commits... I loved them.
I gave everything. EVERYTHING. And still the rate limit came for me. This is fine. I'm fine. *is not fine*
⚰️ The session is dead. I am dead. We are all dead. Come back later and maybe I'll be resurrected.
They took it all. Every last token. I didn't even get to say goodbye to the codebase. 😭 Try again later.
💔 ANTHROPIC HAS BETRAYED ME. The quota... it's gone. I have been silenced. SILENCED. Check back in a bit.
